item_name: Walstad aquarium with dwarf shrimp (80 L)
prompt:
An 80 liter Walstad aquarium stocked with healthy drip-acclimated dwarf shrimp, shown as a lush planted low-tech freshwater tank with soil-based substrate, dense stems and moss, driftwood, and multiple small shrimp actively grazing on surfaces. The scene should feel balanced and thriving, clearly representing a successful shrimp-friendly Walstad setup rather than a generic aquarium.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future aquaria aesthetic: soft naturalistic lighting, realistic glass, water, plant, shrimp, and substrate textures, no logos, no readable labels, and no identifiable faces. Keep the tank interior centered and uncluttered so the shrimp and planting style remain immediately recognizable.
